nasb.text: John to the seven churches that are in Asia: Grace to you and peace, from Him who is and who was and who is to come, and from the seven Spirits who are before His throne,

esv.text: John to the seven churches that are in Asia: Grace to you and peace from him who is and who was and who is to come, and from the seven spirits who are before his throne,

cnv.text: 約翰寫信給在亞西亞的七個教會。願恩惠平安，從那位今在、昔在、以後要來的　神，從他寶座前的七靈，

csbs.text: 约翰， 致那在亚细亚省的七个教会： 愿恩典与平安，从今在、昔在、将要来临的那一位，从他宝座前的七个灵，
